main.description: List buds written by an author, surfacing only the terminal contributions per branch: a bud is included when the author has no descendant bud beneath it. Collapses back-and-forth exchanges so each chain the author participated in appears at most once, represented by their most recent bud in that chain.

actor.description: DID of the author whose buds to list.

cursor.description: Opaque pagination token returned by a prior call.
Opaque pagination token for the next page. Absent when there are no more results.

root.description: The root AT-URI this bloom descends from.
